title: Fluentd Log Event
description: A Fluentd log event consisting of a tag, a timestamp, and an arbitrary record payload. This is the fundamental data unit flowing through a Fluentd pipeline from inputs through filters to outputs.

tag.description: The Fluentd routing tag using dot-separated hierarchical notation. Tags are matched by match directives to route events to the appropriate output plugins.

time.description: The event timestamp. Can be a Unix epoch integer in seconds or a Fluentd EventTime object with nanosecond precision.

EventTime.title: EventTime
EventTime.description: A Fluentd EventTime object providing nanosecond-precision timestamps. Corresponds to MessagePack extension type 0.

Record.title: Record
Record.description: The log record payload. An arbitrary key-value map where keys are strings. Values can be strings, numbers, booleans, arrays, or nested objects as emitted by the source plugin or transformed by filter plugins.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the source system that generated the log event.

service.description: Name of the service or application that emitted the log event.

pid.description: Process ID of the process that generated the log event.

HTTPEventPayload.title: HTTPEventPayload
HTTPEventPayload.description: The request body format for submitting a log event to the Fluentd HTTP Input plugin. The json property wraps the record payload.

json.description: The log record payload wrapped for HTTP submission.

time.description: Unix epoch timestamp for the event in seconds. If omitted, Fluentd uses the server receive time.

ForwardAck.title: ForwardAck
ForwardAck.description: Acknowledgement response sent by a Fluentd aggregator to confirm receipt of a Forward Protocol message batch identified by a chunk ID.

ack.description: The base64-encoded chunk ID from the received message's option map, echoed back to confirm delivery.

PluginConfig.title: PluginConfig
PluginConfig.description: Common configuration fields shared across Fluentd input, output, filter, parser, and formatter plugins.

@type.description: The plugin type identifier used in Fluentd configuration files (e.g., 'tail', 'forward', 'elasticsearch').

@id.description: An optional unique identifier for this plugin instance, used for monitoring and management APIs.
